title: rubus lejeunei var. crispus
intro: Rubus lejeunei var. crispus, also known as the Japanese raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus lejeunei species, which is a type of bramble that produces edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus lejeunei var. crispus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it a valuable plant for various health benefits. The health benefits of consuming Rubus lejeunei var. crispus include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rubus lejeunei var. crispus include teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
